name: Please Find Attached
overview: Two office colleagues decide to be flatmates. Then eventually fall in love with each other..  Meet Shaurya and Sanya. Two young millennials who are trying to find right balance between their work and personal lives in suburban Mumbai. Come on a journey with them as they constantly struggle to find the right work life balance. Can they work it out?
